Extended MSO Model Checking via Small Vertex Integrity.

An improved deterministic parameterized algorithm for cactus vertex deletion.
Theory of Computing Systems, 66, pp. 502–515. 2022. [📕doi][📝arXiv] Conference papers Tatsuya Gima, Tesshu Hanaka, Yasuaki Kobayashi, Yota Otachi, Tomohito Shirai, Akira Suzuki, Yuma Tamura, Xiao Zhou. On the Complexity of List $\mathcal H$-Packing for Sparse Graph Classes.
The 18th International Conference and Workshops on Algorithms and Computation (WALCOM 2024), Kanazawa, Japan, accepted. March, 2024. Julien Courtiel, Paul Dorbec, Tatsuya Gima, Romain Lecoq, Yota Otachi. Orientable Burning Number of Graphs.
The 18th International Conference and Workshops on Algorithms and Computation (WALCOM 2024), Kanazawa, Japan, accepted. March, 2024. Tatsuya Gima, Tesshu Hanaka, Yasuaki Kobayashi, Ryota Murai, Hirotaka Ono, Yota Otachi. Structural Parameterizations of Vertex Integrity.
The 18th International Conference and Workshops on Algorithms and Computation (WALCOM 2024), Kanazawa, Japan, accepted. March, 2024. Tatsuya Gima, Soh Kumabe, Kazuhiro Kurita, Yuto Okada, Yota Otachi. Dichotomies for Tree Minor Containment with Structural Parameters.
The 18th International Conference and Workshops on Algorithms and Computation (WALCOM 2024), Kanazawa, Japan, accepted. March, 2024. [📝arXiv] Tatsuya Gima, Eun Jung Kim, Noleen Köhler, Nikolaos Melissinos, *Manolis Vasilakis. Bandwidth Parameterized by Cluster Vertex Deletion Number.
The 18th International Symposium on Parameterized and Exact Computation (IPEC 2023), Amsterdam, Netherlands, accepted. Sep, 2023. [📝arXiv] *Tatsuya Gima, Yota Otachi. Extended MSO Model Checking via Small Vertex Integrity.
The 33rd International Symposium on Algorithms and Computation (ISAAC 2022), Seoul, Korea, LIPIcs, 248, pp. 20:1–20:15. Dec, 2022. [📘doi][📝arXiv] *Tatsuya Gima, Takehiro Ito, Yasuaki Kobayashi, Yota Otachi. Algorithmic Meta-Theorems for Combinatorial Reconfiguration Revisited.
The 30th Annual European Symposium on Algorithms (ESA 2022), Potsdam, Germany, LIPIcs, 244, pp. 61:1–61:15. Sep, 2022. [📘doi][📝arXiv] *Tatsuya Gima, Tesshu Hanaka, Masashi Kiyomi, Yasuaki Kobayashi, Yota Otachi. Exploring the Gap Between Treedepth and Vertex Cover Through Vertex Integrity.

[📘doi][📝arXiv] Presentations on International Workshops Hiroki Arimura, Tatsuya Gima, Yasuaki Kobayashi, *Hiroomi Nochide, Yota Otachi. Minimum Consistent Subset for Trees Revisited.
The 23rd Japan-Korea Joint Workshop on Algorithms and Computation (WAAC 2023), Nagoya, Japan, accepted. June, 2023. *Ryota Murai, Tatsuya Gima, Tesshu Hanaka, Yasuaki Kobayashi, Hirotaka Ono, Yota Otachi. Structural parameterizations of vertex integrity.
The 23rd Japan-Korea Joint Workshop on Algorithms and Computation (WAAC 2023), Nagoya, Japan, accepted. June, 2023. Tatsuya Gima, Tesshu Hanaka, *Kohei Noro, Hirotaka Ono, Yota Otachi. On a spectral lower bound of treewidth.

content: Name: Tatsuya Gima E-mail: gima [at] nagoya-u.jp Affiliation: Doctoral Course of Department of Mathematical Informatics, Graduate School of Informatics, Nagoya University. title: My CV

content:
Legends
📕: acceptance of Journal papers 📘: acceptance of Conference papers 🧑‍🤝‍🧑: attendance of International workshop 2023 📕November 4th: Four papers has been accepted to WALCOM 2024 📘August 2nd: “Bandwidth Parameterized by Cluster Vertex Deletion Number” with Eun Jung Kim, Noleen Köhler, Nikolaos Melissinos, Manolis Vasilakis has been accepted to IPEC 2023 📕July 26th: “Extended MSO Model Checking via Small Vertex Integrity” with Yota Otachi has been accepted to Algorithmica 🧑‍🤝‍🧑June 24-25th: Three presentations have been accepted to The 23rd Japan-Korea Joint Workshop on Algorithms and Computation (WAAC 2023) 📕June 21st: “On a spectral lower bound of treewidth” with Tesshu Hanaka, Kohei Noro, Hirotaka Ono, and Yota Otachi has been accepted to IEICE Transactions on Information and Systems
